channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Tories accuse Starmer of not revealing all his Mandelson messages – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Henry Nowak murder bodycam footage ‘absolutely harrowing’, says minister

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour not looking to raise taxes to fund benefits, minister says after WhatsApp messages revealed

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK government has failed Palestinian people, says senior Labour MP
item.description: UK government has failed Palestinian people, says senior Labour MP

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian

Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: This week's column: the policy detail from Tony Blair is almost always not worth your time (even in government he did the big picture stuff). But the big picture criticism is right, even tho in many ways the biggest S...
item.description: This week's column: the policy detail from Tony Blair is almost always not worth your time (even in government he did the big picture stuff). But the big picture criticism is right, even tho in many ways the biggest S...

item.title: LabourList: Peter Mandelson causes more embarrassment

item.description: Mandelson files show Labour at war over Starmer

item.title: ConservativeHome: Lord Ashcroft: Labour leadership contenders, is this government better or worse than the Tories, who do people least want to see in office, and should we rejoin the EU?

item.title: FT UK Politics: Blair has shone a spotlight on Starmer’s growth delusion
item.description: Blair has shone a spotlight on Starmer’s growth delusion
